chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No. D- 344 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.03.2023. Mr. Bhooro Bheel, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Assistant Advocate General along with Inspector Ameer Ali Shah on behalf of D.I.G Police Sukkur and Inspector Sikandar Ali on behalf of S.S.P Sukkur. *************** The comments of respondent No. 5 are filed by learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh, which are taken on record, copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks his appointment in Police department on deceased quota as per his qualification. Learned counsel for petitioner after going through the comments filed by respondent No.5 seeks disposal of this petition by directing to respondents to decide the case of the petitioner for appointment on deceased quota as per revised Sindh Police Recruitment Policy, 2022. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
